title: Scattergood Survives a Murder
writer: Clarence Budington Kelland, Michael L. Simmons
actors: Guy Kibbee, John Archer, Margaret Hayes
plot: Scattergood meets the new owner of the local newspaper, Dunker Gillson. One of Gillson's first tasks is to interview the wealthy but reclusive Quentin sisters, Lydia and Cynthia, who have stayed in their old musty house for years....
